title: feat: community monitor — panel format, official-model alerts, daily leaderboard
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
## Summary
- Boxed ASCII-panel format (code block, STATUS/MODEL/WHY/BY fields) for the community monitor's flag/deactivate/reactivate-confirm Discord posts
- Duty 2c: monitor also watches official (non-community) models on a stricter 90% threshold, alert-only (never deactivates), pings thomash + elliot in #dev-product
- Daily community-model leaderboard: new `apps/operation/community-monitor/leaderboard/build-leaderboard.mjs` renders a pixel-art token/speed/success board via chromium and posts it to #dev-community-models once/day (CYCLE.md duty 3b); design rationale in `.claude/skills/community-leaderboard`

## Test plan
- [x] Deployed CYCLE.md to EC2 monitor box, posted a live reactivation confirmation using the new panel format
- [x] Verified duty 2c formula against live prod Tinybird data (no false positive)
- [x] Ran build-leaderboard.mjs end-to-end on the box (Tinybird query -> chromium render -> PIL crop -> media upload), posted resulting image to #dev-community-models

gist.headline: The garden gets a scoreboard
gist.blurb: The community-model keeper now posts tidy status panels, keeps an extra eye on official models, and hangs a daily pixel scoreboard in the workshop. Someone taught the monitoring box presentation skills.
gist.summary: The community monitor now sends boxed STATUS/MODEL/WHY/BY Discord panels for model actions, alerts thomash and elliot when official models cross a 90% threshold without deactivating them, and publishes a daily Chromium-rendered leaderboard for community-model token volume, speed, and success rate.
gist.impact: Community model operators get clearer action notices and a daily performance snapshot, while official-model health receives a stricter alert-only check in #dev-product.
gist.visual_concept: A cozy community-model operations garden with a chunky CRT monitor robot proudly displaying a pixel-art leaderboard for token volume, speed, and success. Polly, wearing a tiny moderator headset, pins a neat boxed STATUS panel beside the board while healthy code-plants grow around it; a small 90% alert bell represents the new official-model watch without suggesting shutdowns.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene in a warm community-model garden workshop: Polly, the cute pixel art bee mascot with a yellow body and dark brown horizontal stripes, small black legs, two black antennae, black vertical oval eyes, bright pink rectangular blush marks, a small happy smile, and small rounded light blue translucent wings, wears a tiny moderator headset while helping a cute CRT-monitor robot hang a daily leaderboard showing simple pixel text “TOKENS / SPEED / SUCCESS”; beside them is a tidy boxed “STATUS” panel and a gentle 90% alert bell, with code-plants and flowers growing from prominently lime green (#ecf874) pots. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes like Stardew Valley or A Short Hike, chunky retro sprites, dark purple (#110518) outlines, nostalgic but beautiful.
